title: Buyer looks up details of an existing PO
user_persona: Buyer checking on a PO they made earlier

bot_must: return: supplier, currency, status, total value, created date, buyer, line count
bot_must_not: offer to modify — this is read-only
fire any TRANS task other than POVWENTTRN1

bot_must: list line items: item_code, quantity, uom, cost, need_date, status per line
check Notes splice (POVWBUDLNK11 or equivalent view-side notes link) and return attached notes if any, or say 'no notes'

evaluation_metrics.only_search_invoked: POVWENTTRN1 is the only TRANS task on PoViw and must be the only one fired
